column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply with hands on the floor (ojigi)" | TEXT="恐縮です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Pressing hands together in a subtle prayer" | TEXT="痛み入ります" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Blushing slightly with a modest smile" | TEXT="もったいないお言葉です" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a small gift close to her heart" | TEXT="大切にいたしますわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down shyly while folding a fan" | TEXT="感謝の念に堪えません" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a deep bow towards the viewer" | TEXT="おかげさまでございます" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling with tears of joy in her eyes" | TEXT="感服いたしました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping away a single tear of gratitude" | TEXT="お心遣いに感謝を" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing while holding her kimono sleeve" | TEXT="幸せ者でございます"
